---
title: "People — 2026"
---

## Organisers

Derek Skillings, Patrick Forber, Rory Smead, Ben Allen, Katie Deaven, and
Karen Kovaka.

## Participants at large

Malcolm Schug and Gwen Robbins Schug.

## Speakers

- **Roberta Millstein** — *keynote:* Aldo Leopold and Environmental Stewardship
- Joseph O'Brien
- Martin Li
- Caleb Hazelwood
- Gray Santana
- Mika Smith
- Leyre Celeda-Marcen
- Gabbi Courtenay
- Larissa Wilks
- Peter Godfrey-Smith
- Julia Pelletier
- Matthew Maxwell
- Stephen M. Downes
- Hannah Rubin
- Marshall Abrams
- Saira Kahn
- Brett Calcott
- Katie Deaven
- Karen Kovaka
- Derek Skillings, Rory Smead & Patrick Forber

See the [talks](talks.qmd) page for the full programme.
